word: H5954 - עֲלַל - ʻălal - al-al' - Bring in

sections.paragraph:
Original: עלל

Transliteration: ‛ălal

Phonetic: al-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to thrust in, go in, come in
    1. (Peal) to go in, come in
    2. (Aphel) to bring in
    3. (Hophal) to be brought in

Origin: corresponding to H5953 (in the sense of thrusting oneself in), to enter

TWOT entry: 2911

Part(s) of speech: Verb
